facebook.content:
Do you know what's holding you back from experiencing more of God's presence in your life? It's not your past, your present struggles, or your lack of faith. It's your mindset. The Bible says, "We look not at the things which are seen, but at the things which are not seen, for the things which are seen are temporal, but the things which are not seen are eternal" (2 Corinthians 4:18).

Think about it, when you're focused on what you can see, you're limited to the physical realm.

instagram.content:
Your identity isn't a reflection of your past, but a declaration of your faith.

"Behold, I make all things new." Revelation 21:5

Just because things used to be one way, doesn't mean they have to be that way now. What area of your life are you ready to renew by faith?
